name: novel-assist
description: AI 辅助小说创作系统 — 阶段一基础闭环（plan.md）
author: NovelAssist

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,ai,frontend -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter backend dev" "cd apps/ai-service && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.ai: cd apps/ai-service && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
